rustc.repair: Run 'make rust-toolchain' on the Windows build box.

cargo.repair: Run 'make rust-toolchain' on the Windows build box.

dotnet.repair: Install the pinned .NET SDK on the Windows build box.

vpk.observation: dotnet tool list -g Package Id/Version/Commands plus %USERPROFILE%\.dotnet\tools\vpk.exe
vpk.repair: Install the pinned Velopack global tool on the Windows build box.

node.observation: node --version with one leading v removed
node.repair: Install Node.js 24.16.0 on the Windows build box.

npm.observation: one reachable callable npm.cmd co-located with the selected pinned node executable, then npm.cmd --version
npm.repair: Install npm 11.13.0 with the pinned Node.js toolchain.

msvc-cl.observation: exact vcvarsall.bat x64 -vcvars_ver=<toolsetVersion> activation plus exact VC\Tools\MSVC\<toolsetVersion>\bin\Hostx64\x64\cl.exe /Bv in one isolated cmd.exe child, with separately attributed activation exit/host/target/toolset and compiler banner/D8003/exit evidence
msvc-cl.repair: Install the pinned Visual Studio Build Tools MSVC x64 toolset.

powershell.repair: Run the release rail under Windows PowerShell 5.1.

smctl.repair: Install DigiCert smctl 1.64.2 on the Windows build box.

signtool.repair: Install the pinned x64 Windows SDK SignTool; ambient PATH copies are not accepted.
